codeReview.summary: The fixture-only follow-up stays within scope and adds the missing end-to-end assertions the feature promised. The mixed-type regression now checks parser-emitted resolved projections for the expanded table/object families, and the equivalent-layout regression now verifies resolved projection determinism for the expanded semantic-family handles without touching parser/runtime code.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The dwg-fixture-worker procedure says to read `.factory/library/user-testing.md`, but that library doc currently describes the DXF-native migration mission rather than this DWG parser fixture mission. The fix worker followed the procedure and still had to rely on mission-specific docs instead, so the shared guidance remains misleading for DWG parser workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: dwg-fixture-worker SKILL.md work procedure step 1 requires `.factory/library/user-testing.md`. The file at `D:/work/plant-code/cad/H7CAD/.factory/library/user-testing.md` is DXF-native focused and does not describe the DWG semantic-type-coverage mission, while the fix transcript shows the worker separately read `mission.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `validation-contract.md`, and `features.json` for actual DWG context.

summary: Pass: reviewed the prior failing feature diff (`8c96475`) and the fix diff (`8cca950`). The prior commit lacked equivalent-layout coverage and mixed-type resolved-projection assertions; the fix commit adds both in `crates/h7cad-native-dwg/tests/read_headers.rs` without widening scope beyond fixture-side scrutiny coverage.
